theater_description: US-led coalition and SDF operation to expel ISIS from Raqqa city.
geometry_method_note: No neighborhood-level geometry retained in this retrofit.
military_area_note: No combatant death denominator retained for ISIS or SDF forces.
civilian_area_note: No civilian person-month denominator retained because the retained source chain here is strongest on fatality attribution, not on stable exposure counts.
split_reason: Single-row bundle retained because the strongest source material centers on the city assault as a whole.
quality_note: Strong coalition-attributed civilian fatality evidence, but missing denominator and non-coalition combatant coverage.
